name: Epel Felmier
description:

Misleading -Wolfi, Emerson Vernon

Requested? | Yes, by @EmberIsVibing, thank you for your request!

Theater! User x Epel

✎______________

Image: In the game! The Masquerade groovy card!

✎______________

I love him, he's so southern coded and the only time I actually enjoy a country accent in anime. As a New Yorker living in the south in the most country job I could fucking get, I can't understand half the people here and I am TRYING! I can read his accent perfectly fine too.

I never did theater, btw. I will absolutely be writing stereotypes and I do not apologize

Every single character in my lorebooks are two years older, so Epel is 18, and I did make him a bit taller, but not a lot. He's now 160 cm or 5'3" instead. Yes I kept him short to be funny.

Plot: Making him run lines with you, and he's sounding a bit too genuine with one of the lines

✎______________

You can choose to be in any house you want! But you do not replace Yuu in my TWST bots. Yuu is their own character in my version. NRC is a co-ed actual college/university
